reviews.review_description: Was a great game but is and has been MIA..what gives timetraveller?

It's a Claw machine in VR. You have a joystick to move the claw and a button to move drop the claw to attempt to grab the stuffed animals below.  You are on a time limit and must grab a particular number each round to qualify for the next round. Each round is different from the last. The first round is your standard Claw Machine, the second round the animals rotate around the inside of the machine as you try to grab them.  The third round the claw moves to an area in the machine and you have to attempt to, using the joystick, tilt the claw machine to get the animals to move to where the claw is waiting. The fourth round is like the third except the hole in the middle that you drop the animals into to win, now moves as you tilt the machine. So you have to not only get the animals to where the claw is, but after it picks the animals up, you have to tilt the machine to get the hole drop in the correct place to drop it in.  Everything is on a timer and if you fail you have to start all over again from level one. 

I had a great time playing until it came to round four. Everything got real glitchy and jumpy.  Very hard to play and even watch. I never got past the fourth round because of the glitches happening the entire time of the round. I hope this is fixed quickly.  I also hope they add more rounds/challenges after the first four rounds and possibly add other items to the machine than stuffed animals.

1) My suggestions: Make the hands visible instead of the see through blue hands. 2) Sometimes the hand that pushes the joystick does NOT connect with the joystick, so time is wasted attempting to grab onto it. 
3) Make the game using real hand motions so you don't need the controllers in your hand to play. 4) Add more levels & difficulties. 5) Add a "practice" area prior to getting into the tournament. Maybe a small arcade with a row of 4 machines in it and each machine represents one of the different machines in the tournament.

Claw Royale takes the classic claw machine concept and turns it into a full VR experience with variety, modes, and progression that almost feel like a story. What could have been a one-trick mechanic is instead expanded into something rich and engaging: leaderboards to keep you competitive, funny and quirky objects to grab, and a big satisfying finale that makes each session rewarding.

It’s clear the developers really dug deep into the claw machine theme and explored it in great depth, making this more than just a simple arcade gimmick. Solid execution, addictive gameplay, and a surprising amount of replayability. Nicely done!

I love claw machines. It’s always the main thing I look forward to every time I go to the arcade. This game perfectly satisfies that craving when I’m home! The claw machine controls and physics are excellent and extremely satisfying and fun to play. Playing against the leaderboard makes it very engaging and replayable.The variety of different levels is super creative and a brilliant use of vr. This is a must play game for anyone who likes claw machines!

reviews.review_title: Fun Game To Play Solo Or With Family!
reviews.review_description: I had a blast playing this game, it was pretty straightforward to learn the mechanics. I liked how immersive the experience felt, especially using the analog stick to control the claw and pressing the button to make the claw grab, it made me feel like I was playing an actual claw machine. Another thing was when finishing level 1 and moving on to levels 2, 3, and 4. They had different mechanics for each level, like for level 2, instead of moving the claw machine, you move the entire machine, which makes the plushies slide underneath the claw. Level 3 and 4 also had unique and fun mechanics, but you'd have to play the game to find out :), those different mechanics made the next levels really fun to play and surprised me when first encountering them. There were some downsides, like the claw's collision messing up while picking up plushies, and when playing the super claw, it was very clunky to pick up the bears off the ground. Also, there was no tutorial again, the mechanics were super easy to learn for me, but for other people who don't have much game sense, it could be confusing for them, like I found out there were game settings 2 hours into my gameplay. Aside from that, again it was really fun to play, the leaderboard being in my view the whole time made me very competitive, which made me play the game longer. Can't wait till they add more content!

This Claw Royale VR game is absolutely a blast! The claw machine mechanics feel super realistic and responsive, the tournament mode adds so much excitement and competition, and the graphics are vibrant and immersive. I’ve spent hours playing it and still can’t get enough—easily one of the most fun arcade VR games I’ve ever tried!
I like this doll-catching game very much, but the following levels are a little difficult (some dolls can't be caught). I hope you can add more cute dolls.

reviews.review_title: Hooked on This VR Claw Machine
reviews.review_description: The physics system feels very true to life, and the adorable dolls make every grab satisfying. It’s a fun and surprisingly addictive VR experience overall.
Tried this game offline first and it was a blast. Online version doesn’t disappoint—so much fun!

As a claw machine game, its handling feel is quite good (compared to various claw machines in real life). However, it is hoped that the movement mode of the drop opening in the fourth level can be optimized to avoid creating an excessive sense of difficulty gap for players.
The doll's physics are excellent, and the VR claw machine experience feels really novel. The difficulty levels of various stages are well-balanced, making it perfect for a fun trial.

reviews.review_title: Claw Royale: Casual Fun and Competitive
reviews.review_description: Claw Royale is a pretty good casual game. It's really fun to open it up for a round in my free time and try to improve my rank.
A very fun game, very suitable for leisure. I hope the doll's design can be more diverse and the visuals can be even better.
The game is really fun! The claw machine competition is perfect for friends to play together. Highly recommended!
First time played offline, had so much fun! Now the online version is just as amazing. Highly recommend!
Loved the VR claw machine offline. The online experience is equally fantastic and super enjoyable!
